PreToolUse.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$eventJson = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $event = $eventJson | ConvertFrom-Json; $paths = @(); $toolInput = $event.tool_input; if ($null -ne $toolInput) { foreach ($name in @('filePath','file_path','path','targetPath')) { if ($toolInput.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $name) { $paths += $toolInput.$name } }; foreach ($name in @('files','paths','filePaths')) { if ($toolInput.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $name) { $paths += @($toolInput.$name) } } }; $paths = @($paths | Where-Object { $null -ne $_ -and $_.ToString().Trim().Length -gt 0 } | Select-Object -Unique); if ($paths.Count -eq 0) { '{\"continue\":true}' ; exit 0 }; foreach ($path in $paths) { $result = & pwsh -NoProfile -File './tools/hooks/aisraf-allowed-path-prewrite-guard.ps1' -TargetPath $path 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { [Console]::Error.WriteLine(($result -join [Environment]::NewLine)); exit 2 } }; '{\"continue\":true}'"

PostToolUse.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$eventJson = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $event = $eventJson | ConvertFrom-Json; $paths = @(); $toolInput = $event.tool_input; if ($null -ne $toolInput) { foreach ($name in @('filePath','file_path','path','targetPath')) { if ($toolInput.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $name) { $paths += $toolInput.$name } }; foreach ($name in @('files','paths','filePaths')) { if ($toolInput.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $name) { $paths += @($toolInput.$name) } } }; $paths = @($paths | Where-Object { $null -ne $_ -and $_.ToString().Trim().Length -gt 0 } | Select-Object -Unique); if ($paths.Count -eq 0) { '{\"continue\":true}' ; exit 0 }; foreach ($path in $paths) { $result = & pwsh -NoProfile -File './tools/hooks/aisraf-focused-validator-postwrite.ps1' -TargetPath $path 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { [Console]::Error.WriteLine(($result -join [Environment]::NewLine)); exit 2 } }; '{\"continue\":true}'"

Stop.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$summary = & pwsh -NoProfile -File './tools/hooks/aisraf-session-stop-summary.ps1' -WrapperId provider-hook -InputsRead none -OutputsWritten none -ValidatorsInvoked none -Status PROVIDER_STOP 2>&1; $message = (($summary -join '; ') -replace '\\','/') -replace '"',''''; '{\"continue\":true,\"systemMessage\":\"' + $message + '\"}'"
